text:
*[Bug 19030] New: Enable constant folding of paste / paste0?*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19030>

            Bug ID: 19030
           Summary: Enable constant folding of paste / paste0?
           Product: R
           Version: R-devel (trunk)
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Other
            Status: NEW
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Wishlist
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:kevinushey@gmail.com|kevinushey@gmail.com>

Created attachment 3644
  --> <https://bugs.r-project.org/attachment.cgi?id=3644&action=edit>
Add paste, paste0 to compiler:::foldFuns.

A somewhat common pattern in R packages / R code is to use `paste()` and
`paste0()` to construct larger strings from literals. For example:

```
  regex <- paste0(
    "^(?<leading_dots>[.]{0,2})",
    "(?<numbers>[0-9]*)",
    "(?<leftovers>[^0-9]?.*$)"
  )
```

Could these functions be constant folded / evaluated at compile-time during
byte code compilation? If I understand correctly, they could be added to the
`compiler:::foldFuns` list, and the existing infrastructure would handle it
correctly out-of-the-box.

```
Index: src/library/compiler/R/cmp.R
===================================================================
--- src/library/compiler/R/cmp.R        (revision 89685)
+++ src/library/compiler/R/cmp.R        (working copy)
@@ -502,7 +502,7 @@
 foldFuns <- c("+", "-", "*", "/", "^", "(",
               ">", ">=", "==", "!=", "<", "<=", "||", "&&", "!",
               "|", "&", "%%",
-              "c", "rep", ":",
+              "c", "rep", ":", "paste", "paste0",
               "abs", "acos", "acosh", "asin", "asinh", "atan", "atan2",
               "atanh", "ceiling", "choose", "cos", "cosh", "exp", "expm1",
               "floor", "gamma", "lbeta", "lchoose", "lgamma", "log", "log10",
```

---

```
$ R --version
R version 4.5.3 (2026-03-11) -- "Reassured Reassurer"
Copyright (C) 2026 The R Foundation for Statistical Computing
Platform: aarch64-apple-darwin20
```

text:
*[Bug 19031] New: patch: implement fast path for |, & in byte code evaluator*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19031>

            Bug ID: 19031
           Summary: patch: implement fast path for |, & in byte code
                    evaluator
           Product: R
           Version: R-devel (trunk)
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Other
            Status: NEW
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Low-level
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:kevinushey@gmail.com|kevinushey@gmail.com>

Created attachment 3645
  --> <https://bugs.r-project.org/attachment.cgi?id=3645&action=edit>
Implement FastLogic2.

FastLogic2 was just falling back to Builtin2; this patch implements the actual
dispatch to support fast evaluation here.

Implement FastLogic2.

FastLogic2 was just falling back to Builtin2; this patch implements the actual
dispatch to support fast evaluation here.
